intent: Fix ebook library visibility by updating Library.tsx so that when both audiobooks and ebooks exist, the default view shows all formats (not just audiobooks). Changes include: fixing auto-filter to only fire for single-format libraries, updating activeModeLabel to return 'Books' for unset/mixed format, fixing modeBooksForMedia to return all books when format is unset, switching format comparisons to use activeFormatTab, and adding E2E tests for single-format auto-filter behavior.
reviewers: kieran-typescript (stack-specific conditional -- diff touches TypeScript component logic and test code)
